<!doctype html><html lang=ja><head><meta charset=utf-8><meta name=viewport content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>有限会社ジャフレックス｜JAFLEX Ltd.</title><style>*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;font:15px/1.7 Arial,"Noto Sans JP",sans-serif;color:#172033}img{max-width:100%;display:block}a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}.w{width:min(1100px,calc(100% - 28px));margin:auto}header{background:#fff}.h{height:82px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.logo{width:min(380px,70vw)}button{display:none}.nav{border-top:1px solid #ddd;border-bottom:3px solid #17367f}.nav .w{display:flex;justify-content:center}.nav a{padding:12px 15px;font-weight:700}.hero{position:relative;height:470px;display:grid;align-items:center;background:#071b45;overflow:hidden}.hero>img{position:absolute;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}.shade{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(5,20,55,.92),rgba(5,20,55,.35))}.hc{position:relative;color:#fff}.hc h1{font-size:clamp(38px,6vw,68px);line-height:1.2;margin:0}.hc p{max-width:600px}.e{color:#315aa6;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase}.s{padding:75px 0}.soft{background:#f4f7fb}.navy{background:#0b245e;color:#fff}.intro,.company,.contact{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.8fr 1.2fr;gap:55px}.intro p{color:#657184}.title{margin-bottom:28px}.title h2,.s h2{font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,42px);margin:0}.prod{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;background:#fff;border:1px solid #dbe2ed;margin:26px 0;box-shadow:0 14px 36px #17367f20}.prod.r{grid-template-columns:.9fr 1.1fr}.prod.r .pic{order:2}.pic img{width:100%;height:100%;min-height:390px;object-fit:cover}.txt{padding:38px}.txt h3{font-size:30px;color:#17367f;margin:4px 0}.mk{max-height:55px;width:auto;margin-bottom:10px}.pair,.gallery{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px}.pair img{width:100%;height:260px;object-fit:cover}.gallery{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.gallery img{width:100%;height:230px;object-fit:cover}.gallery figure,.pair figure{margin:0;position:relative}.gallery figcaption,.pair figcaption{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;color:#fff;padding:28px 12px 8px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,#000b)}.tbl div{display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;border-top:1px solid #ffffff40}.tbl span{padding:13px}.clients{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:#dbe2ed}.clients div{background:#fff;padding:22px;text-align:center;font-weight:700}.links{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:15px}.card{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:center;padding:20px;border:1px solid #dbe2ed}.card img{width:80px;max-height:65px;object-fit:contain}.foot{background:#071b45;color:#cbd5e7;padding:35px 0}.foot img{width:300px;background:#fff;padding:5px}@media(max-width:800px){button{display:block}.nav{display:none}.nav.open{display:block}.nav .w{display:grid}.intro,.company,.contact,.prod,.prod.r{grid-template-columns:1fr}.prod.r .pic{order:0}.gallery{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.clients{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}@media(max-width:520px){.s{padding:55px 0}.hero{height:500px}.txt{padding:26px}.gallery,.pair,.links,.clients{grid-template-columns:1fr}.gallery img,.pair img{height:220px}.tbl div{grid-template-columns:1fr}}</style></head><body id=top><header><div class="w h"><img class=logo src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="JAFLEX Ltd."><button>メニュー</button></div><nav class=nav><div class=w><a href=#top>トップページ</a><a href=#company>会社案内</a><a href=#products>取扱商品</a><a href=#history>沿革</a><a href=#clients>主な取引先</a><a href=#links>関連リンク</a></div></nav></header><main><section class=hero><img src="data:image/webp;base64,"
